mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, subtotal) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
